}

Purchases

{{ movements.length }}
@for (m of movements; track m.id) {

{{ m.productName }}

{{ m.size }} / {{ m.color }} · {{ m.quantity }} @ Rs. {{ m.unitCost ? (m.unitCost | number:'1.0-0') : '?' }} @if (m.lotCode) { · {{ m.lotCode }} }

Rs. {{ (m.lineCost ?? 0) | number:'1.0-0' }}

{{ m.createdAt | date:'d MMM yyyy' }}

@if (m.paymentMode) { {{ m.paymentMode | uppercase }} @if (m.paymentMode === 'credit' && m.dueDate) { · due {{ m.dueDate | date:'d MMM' }} } }
} @empty {

No purchases recorded yet.

}

@for (p of payments; track p.id) {

}

by {{ p.createdBy }}

Rs. {{ p.amount | number:'1.0-0' }}

} @empty {

}
